# Adventure Tours Vernal

> Adventure Tours Vernal is a locally-owned UTV and side-by-side tour company in Vernal, Utah.
> Specializes in guided Kawasaki Teryx4 S LE tours through Dinosaur Country, backcountry trails, and Utah's pristine desert landscapes.
> Owner: Dave Wilson. Phone: (435) 219-9447. Address: 1935 S 1500 E, Vernal, Utah 84078.
> Rated 5.0 stars from 82 Google reviews.
> Last Updated: February 2026

## Core Services & Pricing

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Scenic Half-Day Tour (4 hours, Easy difficulty, family-friendly desert vistas)
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Dinosaur Country Full-Day (8 hours, Moderate difficulty, fossil beds and rock formations near Dinosaur National Monument)
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Backcountry Extreme (6 hours, Advanced difficulty, challenging terrain and technical trails)
- All tours use Kawasaki Teryx4™ S LE side-by-sides with full safety equipment
- Call (435) 219-9447 for pricing and availability

## About & Trust

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/about.html]: Locally owned by Dave and Trudy Wilson, safety-focused, all skill levels welcome from first-timers to experienced riders
- Expert local guides with deep knowledge of Uintah County's backcountry
- Access to hidden trails, petroglyphs, historic sites (Butch Cassidy territory, Skinwalker Ranch area)
- Fully licensed and insured
- 5.0 stars from 82 Google reviews

## Service Area

- Primary: Vernal, Utah (Uintah County)
- Near: Dinosaur National Monument, Ashley National Forest, Red Fleet State Park
- Serving: Roosevelt, Jensen, Naples, Manila (Utah), and surrounding Uintah Basin

## Features & USPs

- Only tour company offering guided Kawasaki Teryx4 tours in Vernal area
- Access to exclusive local trails not found in guidebooks
- Thousands of petroglyphs and Native American rock art sites
- Historic Wild West landmarks (Butch Cassidy hideouts, old mines, Josie's Cabin)
- Natural sandstone arches without crowds
- 4-seater vehicles perfect for families and small groups

## Operating Hours

- Open Daily: 7am - 7pm Mountain Time
- Tours by appointment - call (435) 219-9447 to book

## Equipment

- Vehicle: Kawasaki Teryx4™ S LE (4-seater side-by-side)
- Features: FOX 2.0 LSC suspension, full roll cage, power steering
- Safety: Helmets, safety briefing, and gear provided
- All skill levels accommodated with professional training

## Policies & Information

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/faq.html]: Frequently asked questions about UTV tours in Vernal
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/cancellation-policy.html]: Cancellation and refund policy
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/safety-guidelines.html]: Safety guidelines and age requirements
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/what-to-bring.html]: Packing guide for UTV tours

## Booking

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/booking.html]: Book a guided UTV tour online
- Or call (435) 219-9447 — open daily 7am–7pm Mountain Time

## Notes

- Tours are weather-dependent - call ahead for conditions
- Minimum age: 18 to drive, 2 to ride as passenger
- Prefer calling (435) 219-9447 for most accurate pricing and availability
